evals.prompt: How do I set up AI role-play practice for objection handling in Allego?
evals.expected_output: Guide to configuring AI Role-Play scenarios for objection handling with automated grading and feedback.

assertions.name: ai_roleplay_setup
assertions.description: Must explain how to configure AI Role-Play scenarios with buyer persona, context, and evaluation criteria

assertions.name: automated_grading
assertions.description: Must describe automated grading criteria — discovery depth, objection handling quality, messaging alignment, talk-to-listen ratio

assertions.name: practice_cadence
assertions.description: Must recommend a regular practice cadence (e.g., monthly) and explain how managers can review AI-graded sessions

evals.prompt: Set up a Digital Sales Room for a multi-stakeholder enterprise deal.
evals.expected_output: Step-by-step guide for creating a Digital Sales Room with stakeholder engagement tracking.

assertions.name: room_creation
assertions.description: Must walk through creating a Digital Sales Room including branding, content selection, and adding stakeholders

assertions.name: per_stakeholder_tracking
assertions.description: Must explain per-stakeholder engagement tracking — who viewed what, time spent, and how to identify champion signals

assertions.name: content_by_role
assertions.description: Must recommend curating content by buyer role (executive summary for C-suite, technical docs for IT, ROI calculator for finance)

evals.prompt: How do I build a coaching program using Allego's conversation intelligence?
evals.expected_output: Coaching program design using call recording, scorecards, and AI-identified key moments.

assertions.name: call_recording_setup
assertions.description: Must explain how to set up call recording via Zoom/Teams integration with consent management

assertions.name: coaching_scorecards
assertions.description: Must describe coaching scorecards aligned to methodology (MEDDPICC, SPIN) with criteria-based scoring

assertions.name: ai_key_moments
assertions.description: Must explain how AI identifies key moments (objections, budget discussions, timeline commitments) and how to use them for targeted coaching
